title: 3rd angel
wikitext:
[]: 3rd angel             Quote Post by Rahxephon » Fri May 31, 2013 8:52 am Most of the angels, even if looking strange, seem biological and explode into blood or whatever when they die... the third angel somehow was captured in its whole state and studied until nothing was left was pretty much bones? Wonder how they defeated and captured it without it turning to blood, well obviously it wasnt dead completely as it returned to life eh? My main question about the third angel, is those red and blue wires extending from his head/brain area down his spine. Looks like electronic wires? I thought that was strange, as they seem nothing like veins, and look like electronic wiring. Could this be something that NERV branch put in the angel while they were studying it? Another question I have to ask is how come so many angels are missing in the EvaWiki? it goes straight from the first angel Kaworu to the 3rd one from 2nd movie so no 1rst movie angels from rebuild are explained in the wiki... I guess because the first movie is so similar to TV show.

[]: Re: 3rd angel             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Fri May 31, 2013 9:03 am Rahxephon wrote: Another question I have to ask is how come so many angels are missing in the EvaWiki? it goes straight from the first angel Kaworu to the 3rd one from 2nd movie so no 1rst movie angels from rebuild are explained in the wiki... I guess because the first movie is so similar to TV show.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Fri May 31, 2013 10:09 am The Third Angel was apparently in perma-frost when they found it, and apparently immobile. This allowed Nerv to study it literally almost to death until it woke up. The wiring and such as definitely added by Nerv, particularly the "pseudo entry plug" (yes, that's an official term for it) that seems to be sticking into it. The main theory is that Nerv was trying to "pilot" or control the Angel, but never succeeded (which may have been one of the causes of it awakening).

[]:             Quote Post by Rahxephon » Fri May 31, 2013 5:10 pm Shinoyami65 wrote: The Third Angel was apparently in perma-frost when they found it, and apparently immobile. This allowed Nerv to study it literally almost to death until it woke up. The wiring and such as definitely added by Nerv, particularly the "pseudo entry plug" (yes, that's an official term for it) that seems to be sticking into it. The main theory is that Nerv was trying to "pilot" or control the Angel, but never succeeded (which may have been one of the causes of it awakening).
